summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CryptoQuiz Telegram Mini App. Critical LLM budget issue blocking all quiz generation functionality.

critical_bugs.issue: LLM budget exceeded - Current cost: 0.0028975, Max budget: 0.001
Same LLM budget issue affecting solo quiz generation

ui_bugs.issue: No error feedback shown to user when quiz generation fails
ui_bugs.selector: generate buttons show infinite loading state
ui_bugs.details: Users see 'Generating Quiz...' indefinitely with no error message

integration_issues.issue: Frontend doesn't handle backend 500 errors gracefully

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with all navigation buttons
Article fetching and content display works
Join page form inputs and validation work
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix LLM budget issue - Current Emergent API key has exceeded budget (0.0028975 > 0.001). This blocks ALL quiz generation functionality (both multiplayer and solo modes). Need to either increase budget limit or provide new API key with sufficient budget.
